name: Brain Crusher
name_jp: ブレイン・クラッシャー
desc: Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card destroyed an opponent's monster by battle and sent it to the GY this turn while you controlled it: You can target 1 of those destroyed monsters in the GY; Special Summon that target.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card destroyed an opponent's monster by battle and sent it to the GY this turn while you controlled it: You can target 1 of those destroyed monsters in the GY; Special Summon that target.
eff: Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card destroyed an opponent's monster by battle and sent it to the GY this turn while you controlled it: You can target 1 of those destroyed monsters in the GY; Special Summon that target.

sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX Spirit Caller promotional cards
Battle Pack 2: War of the Giants
Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

jp_sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! GX Spirit Caller promotional cards

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
